source.name: Ant Design
source.license_notes: Use source links and summarized guidance only; do not copy full documentation verbatim.

layout_rules: Choose horizontal, vertical, or inline layout based on density and scanning needs.
Use label alignment and grid columns consistently across a page.
For advanced table search, use compact multi-column forms.
accessibility_notes: Keep labels and validation messages attached to their fields.
Use scroll-to-error behavior for long forms.
implementation_hints: Use for React admin forms where validation and layout control are important.
Make required vs optional fields explicit at the form level.

quality.notes: Official Ant Design Form component summarized.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use Ant Design Form for enterprise React forms: controlled validation, label/grid layout, disabled states, scroll-to-first-error, and compact advanced-search layouts.
